textByHash.7176469bee12e95ad5a489885577dfb377e1b827: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?
textByHash.ec724b1a993cad2a5236b5ba46e0fbb8de8edcc3: What are you doing ringing that bell?! Don't you think some of us have work to do?
textByHash.9a88e8f53617845f926f318a56068d638318c2a2: Well...anyway...we're very busy here, hurry up what do you want?
textByHash.42325ca3b9ae0524384144de66d34b49db437105: What are you doing bothering me? Don't you think some of us have work to do?
textByHash.9d53b3feb9e6af9b28c633de18039d26acc906ad: Well... I am, I suppose, anyway... we're very busy here, hurry up, what do you want?
textByHash.0a0ae854ef48c4d7c212178daa992d2a9b4f7658: All my.... whatever do you mean...?
textByHash.d22869474c7a5c2f3f098d013ccf8cde24f6da49: That's silly! No one would kill a wizard... would they?
textByHash.57250f1f0c99dd5fcdbca980ebff40b1d92321ca: Bert? Ahh yes, the sandman who seems to have been working very long hours recently. Let's see that hand...
textByHash.97e17bbe514d13ff03bc1a9b9bbd18c3abb69c04: Oh my! This is most definitely Clarence, my most able student! You must find out who did this!
textByHash.2df9f1f0ba729b003ae3efba55b87c412967232d: Well.... Ask Bert about the long hours he's been working, that sounds suspicious to me. Digging things up at all hours of the day isn't natural.
textByHash.9dc34a8f90dac4df34a549e91d78c38d43d0be4c: Did you find out who killed Clarence yet?
textByHash.fec71b3728d637e21058db059daaab84b91ac9fa: I recognise that type of scroll! It's used in a mind altering spell of some sort. Did you speak to this... Sandy guy? Perhaps he has a hand in this.
textByHash.0d59300210d7e2ffd174a0a00214e84f33962f80: Even more suspicious! Here, take this magical scrying orb and get some Truth Serum from Betty in Port Sarim, she owes me a favour, just tell her I sent you if she complains.
textByHash.8da64281e5617b8d83236564d897e8c65e1e81e0: Then you will be equipped to ask Sandy a few questions. Oh Clarence, I will find your murderer!
textByHash.ed88f3195e193d14516141b650894d40bd584b67: I'd give you another magical scrying orb if you had some space in your inventory.
textByHash.c4c009f4355a469e459c44ea553fb960f3791918: No matter, here, have another and please hurry, whoever killed Clarence must pay!
textByHash.06925f5cccfd1ed0cca79b16e656c3c3fe5ada79: Bring me a vial and I'll help you a little more.
textByHash.996ed9d19fa3b19c2a14065a93ba8c6126a77a52: Ok, would you like me to transport you to Port Sarim? I'm sticking my neck out a bit helping you like this and can only do it once though!
textByHash.2a4283dd333926c8c0573d66363ebd6537a8ac0d: Off you go then, break a leg!
textByHash.36ad860d61e9311a74f5c8dda5a9930b017fcf57: Have you made the serum and talked to Sandy yet?
textByHash.26187a23e120361de0bf604b7579e9621e99d246: It's ok, I saw the whole thing as the orb is connected via magic to me as I enchanted it.
textByHash.72d12a4b1971c07d4a529c0af327a14c939acb4c: I think this Sandy needs a lesson, please bring me 5 earth runes and a bucket of sand.
textByHash.89cbdffe0fe5b5ee608c2f3a5901202b5394e63e: Well, well...I think this Sandy needs a lesson, please bring me 5 earth runes and a bucket of sand.
textByHash.db1b56bc203e41aa07addac6edbf852fcb7fbf58: Don't question me or you'll end up as braindead as that legless Guard Captain!
textByHash.5d05067372ff682d9e89e2a8051ad4d3b2fc812c: You really mean you forgot? Bring me 5 earth runes and 1 bucket of sand to help stop that moneygrabbing Sandy!
textByHash.22007f33c4da229c3cd355025b3192a88d49224e: Ahh excellent, let's have those! Watch and learn...
textByHash.101a8c4f675a7f296bc428a82c2a2247da423a5b: There, the sand pit will now magically refill. No more work for Bert!
textByHash.6d429012bed4e54dd6f97f99b4c463386bf3938c: We must find the rest of Clarence, I've sent some wizards out to some of the sandpits, would you please check the Entrana sandpit?
textByHash.dd66097979ed0e0a21148b969a4916de0ffd5ffb: Did you visit the Entrana sandpit yet? Ask the worker there if he's found an arm or a leg.
textByHash.432db7ed198f61f0d6a02adce1475c986aab4022: Alas poor Clarence. I knew him.
textByHash.837b4f23b40ac61298cc1398b0a3194467109d86: Thank you - we shall bury him today. I have sent word for the guards to arrest Sandy, so no one will ever see him again!
textByHash.510ddd5bffb7f20b2bfc227ef30706664ef2c361: Hmmm, well this is an uncommon spell component. On its own it's useless, but with certain necromantic spells it can be very powerful. Did you find anything else there?
textByHash.0cf2de92e49604d5e818af1977a4f3d741eed5dd: Hmmm, no, that's not really associated with this to be honest. Did you find anything else there?
textByHash.0227028badd02824af57fe6538ac7aa47557ffbd: I don't know what to say then, there isn't enough to go on with the clues you've shown me so far. I'd suggest going back to search a bit more, but you may just be wasting your time?
textByHash.40724b1c86aae05fe47e0177b724e3c3f098f6c4: Hmm, but this prism does seem to have some magical protection. Once you've finished with this item, bring it back to me would you? I may have a reward for you!
textByHash.a982c8a9dcbaab58b7690644b64d28b2e3a5cedb: Hmm, this is a half torn spell page, it requires another spell component to be effective. Did you find anything else there?
textByHash.a62b51bb2dfe61332f6fe7f6f8509d1f6f1322b8: Hmmm, now this is interesting! Where did you get these from?
textByHash.fd8867429e434ac5037787f65f1940197ca0b761: This is very troubling , very troubling indeed. While it's permitted for learned members of our order to research the 'dark arts', it's absolutely forbidden to make use of such magic.
textByHash.a551ed45bd82de275853647df519b6e1f2a12118: Well a wizard by the name of 'Sithik Ints' was doing some research in this area. He may know something about it. He's lodged at that guest house to the North, though he's ill and isn't able to leave his room.
textByHash.940d05eededea285aeacae5409e306102fe4ddd3: Why not go and talk to him, poke around a bit and see if anything comes up. Let me know how you get on. However, I doubt that 'Sithik' had anything to do with it.
textByHash.0d030495bfc0dfda91a0234a767a4527b37fbcef: Hmm, that black prism seems to have some magical protection. Once you've finished with this item, bring it back to me would you. I may have a reward for you.
textByHash.2e7f7ab87fa4ee98797819f5178680bf99662829: Yes, you've already showed me that, bring it to me when you've resolved the problems at Jiggig and I'll see what I can do.
textByHash.ac356101297d5a14a18e2a0697173d0c4b35efa0: I don't know what to say then really, there isn't enough to go on here as it is. I'd suggest going back to search a bit more, but you may just be wasting your time.
textByHash.800da533e5f985ffdae2781aa4791f370d368dbc: Who the demonikin is that? Is it meant to be a portrait of Sithik, it doesn't look anything like him!
textByHash.f6d052eab0070e24998f7d0a5f1fcb4ef83250ff: Hmm, great...but I already know what he looks like!
textByHash.c1c7a4c582e0e2ce7ef18dd95490f5d25d4fa156: You should go and have a chat with Sithik Ints, he's in that house just to the north. He's a lodger and has a room upstairs. Just tell him that I sent you to see him. He should be fine once you've mentioned my name.
textByHash.91b5db55024c7d5902a8f1f4ee7c60d1e8b71348: He's in that house just to the north, less than a few seconds walk away. He's a lodger and has a room upstairs...he's not very well though.
textByHash.f9b4549e86a3ef5271fb4a934329f8dc9d952c86: Yeah, you've shown me this before...if this is all the evidence you have?
textByHash.1cf8b5bcfb762814abfdbe4283abfe838da25cf9: Ok, so he's researching necromancy...it doesn't mean anything in itself.
textByHash.b968d6e4b0b96789944ce076f5bc13cf23a0ed6a: Hmm, yes, but someone could have stolen that from him and then gone and cast it without his permission or to try and deliberately implicate him.
textByHash.a23cb0ca8189bc1f1f99d353110c49ef371c5d75: So what, hating monsters isn't a crime in itself...although I suppose that it does give a motive if Sithik was involved. On its own, it's not enough evidence though.
textByHash.36a6a405922d3412c44255fd4eeb92fb3ec77300: That doesn't mean anything in itself, you could have gotten that from anywhere. Even from the Dragon Inn tavern! There isn't anything to link Brentle Vahn with Sithik Ints.
textByHash.4e8c4488db411c792cf0eefd78a6ffc902037c67: However, there isn't enough evidence for me to take the issue further at this point. If you find any further evidence bring it to me.
textByHash.3ed5ec330f1b21c295620a35bd5a757da69b9028: And I'm starting to think that Sithik may be involved. Here, take this potion and give some to Sithik. It'll bring on a change which should solicit some answers - tell him the effects won't revert until he's told the truth.
textByHash.6a5036d11a9c2d0a84fc15971470db3d487e17f3: Have you used that potion yet?
textByHash.3de56cb2d282803dd92ebbe1bd2d7a3f6fd595fe: Sure, but don't lose it this time.
textByHash.9047273a3bcf443ef3a20b077ed5a19fda465cba: Try to use the potion on Sithik somehow, he should undergo an interesting transformation, though you'll probably want to leave the house in case there are any side effects. Then go back and question Sithik and tell
textByHash.6e43e5247bb534e75ccf3d530bf930a2599c4bdb: him the effects won't wear off until he tells the truth. In fact, that's not exactly true, but I'm sure it'll be an extra incentive to get him to be honest.
textByHash.b3c21decf08b7ca02d36b0a400b4fec27732db9e: Don't you worry about Sithik, he's not likely to be moving from his bed for a long time. When he eventually does get better, he's going to be sent before a disciplinary tribunal, then we'll sort out what's what.
textByHash.53cb583fad15806e6d5b83946112f47e870defbc: Ooohh, no thanks required. It's I who should be thanking you my friend...your investigative mind has shown how vigilant we really should be for this type of evil use of the magical arts.
textByHash.b9197013099e6e7440c253eb14dd9a9e4d596611: This is the finest wizards' establishment in the land. We have magic portals to the other towers of wizardry around Gielinor. We have a particularly wide collection of runes in our rune shop. We sell some of the finest
textByHash.af01cc6d973913fa318fe2f1a671b5015bb8e10c: mage robes in the land and we have a training area full of zombies for you to practice your magic on.
textByHash.127d39b5a6d5580abbcea56f9b1810d8d173140f: You need a magic level of 66, the high magic energy level is too dangerous for anyone below that level.
textByHash.b108c3e2ada2dcc2325b4c2bbbac2ef5a8de517f: I'm the Grand Secretary for the Wizards' Guild, I have lots of correspondence to keep up with, as well as attending to the discipline of the more problematic guild members.
textByHash.8b50504e79801e608d387ee6a0b90f28eb4490e5: Thank you so much for helping to lay Clarence to rest and lock up his murderer!
